company_context: Reify Health September 22, 2022 Some Reify Health history and the Story of OneStudyTeam For over a decade at Reify Health, we have been on a mission to remove clinical trial operations as the bottleneck on delivering new therapies to patients. Science should dictate how fast we get new therapies to patients, not clinical trial operations. As we get better at medical science, we need to be able to run more clinical trials to keep up. So, this already painful bottleneck will become even worse over time if we don’t do something about it. We’ve known from early on that succeeding in this mission would require significant innovation across the clinical trial life cycle. We would need to break down traditional barriers to accessing clinical trials for patients around the world. We would need to develop improved models for how trials are conducted once a patient joins a study. We would need to orchestrate all the complex global logistics required to make these things happen at scale. Ultimately, we would need to increase clinical capacity (be able to run many more clinical trials each year). In 2015 we launched two initiatives within Reify Health to begin covering some of that ground. Initiative One One initiative focused on bringing new-to-research physicians and their clinical practices – oftentimes located in underserved communities – into the clinical trial ecosystem. By systematically building new research sites over and over, we expanded access to clinical trials for patients, communities, and healthcare providers, while developing the expertise necessary to innovate in how trials are run. This initiative became Care Access – a company now leading the charge for our industry in building trusted, long-term partnerships with communities and making clinical trials accessible to those communities across the nation and around the world. Initiative Two The other initiative sought to bring the research site’s workflow online – to connect the place where sites work to sponsors’ workflows and, eventually, the other key stakeholders in the ecosystem. In 2015, we saw that those stakeholders who were all working together toward a common goal (i.e. assessing whether or not a potential new therapy is safe and effective) were doing their work in silos. However, to predictably enroll clinical trials and deliver a high quality patient experience, we would need technology to connect the complex workflows of research sites, sponsors, patients, and other key players and allow for more seamless collaboration. We started by connecting sites and sponsors. We created a new product model that allowed sites and sponsors to work together on a common platform (this sounds obvious and simple, but is really hard to do!), and we applied this new model directly to clinical trial enrollment. We helped sites more effectively pre-screen and enroll their studies. Simultaneously, sponsors were connected to sites’ workflows for the first time, allowing sites to keep sponsors informed

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, Dr. Patel. Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. I'm calling from DeepData AI, and we specialize in data processing solutions for clinical trial operations. I came across Reify Health and was impressed with your mission to remove clinical trial operations as a bottleneck in delivering new therapies to patients. I think our solution could help support that goal.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (skeptical) Ah, another data processing solution. We've looked at several options already, and to be honest, I'm not convinced we need another one. What makes DeepData AI so special?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand your skepticism, Dr. Patel. What sets us apart is our ability to integrate with existing systems and provide real-time insights, allowing for more efficient trial operations. Our AI-powered engine can process large amounts of data, reducing manual errors and increasing the speed of trial completion. We've had success with similar companies in the past, and I'd love to share some case studies with you.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (concerned about price) I'm not sure we have the budget for this. We're already investing heavily in other initiatives, and I'm not sure where this would fit in our priority list. Can you tell me more about the costs associated with implementing DeepData AI?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that budget is always a concern. Our pricing is competitive, and we offer flexible plans to accommodate different needs. We've worked with companies of various sizes, and our solution has consistently provided a strong ROI. In fact, one of our clients saw a 30% reduction in trial timelines, resulting in significant cost savings. I'd be happy to provide a customized quote and discuss how we can help you achieve similar results.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (objection about timing) I'm not sure this is the right time for us. We're in the middle of implementing other changes, and I don't want to add another project to the mix. Can this wait a few months?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I understand that timing is crucial. However, I'd like to propose that implementing DeepData AI could actually help support your current initiatives. Our solution can help streamline processes, reducing the workload and allowing your team to focus on higher-priority tasks. We can also provide a phased implementation to minimize disruption. Would you be open to a demo to see how our solution can address your specific pain points?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: (objection about authority) I'm not sure I'm the right person to be making decisions about this. I'd need to discuss it with our operations team and get their buy-in. Can you provide some information that I can share with them?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, Dr. Patel. I can provide a summary of our conversation, along with some case studies and technical information that you can share with your team. I'd also be happy to set up a call with our technical expert to address any questions they may have. Additionally, I'd like to offer a trial of our solution to demonstrate its value firsthand. Would you be interested in scheduling a follow-up demo and trial to explore how DeepData AI can support Reify Health's goals?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Alright, let's schedule that demo. I'll invite our operations team to join, and we can discuss further. Can you send over some information and we can schedule a time that works for everyone?

analysis.raw:
Score: 8
Outcome: Success
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller could have more effectively addressed the buyer's initial skepticism by providing more specific and tailored examples of how DeepData AI's solution could support Reify Health's unique goals and challenges. Sentiment: Neutral
